case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1304 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.12.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Kashif Hussain Memon, Assistant Education Officer(Primary) Ghotki >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner would avail his remedy before the competent Court of civil jurisdiction, therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant Constitutional Petition Such proposal of the learned counsel for the petitioner is not opposed by learned AAG Sindh. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed, however, the petitioner is at liberty to avail his remedy before the competent Court of civil jurisdiction, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
